mods.preference.TokenExtractorPreference.android:title: Token Extractor
mods.preference.TokenExtractorPreference.android:summary: Instantly check your clipboard for a Discord user token, or view step-by-step instructions to find your token

SwitchPreference.android:title: Enable NeonX RPC
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Shows a custom 'NeonX Cord' Rich Presence on your profile when logged in via token

SwitchPreference.android:title: Show RPC for all logins
SwitchPreference.android:summary: If enabled, the custom RPC will show for all login methods, not just token logins

SwitchPreference.android:title: Auto-Complete Onboarding
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Automatically selects and submits all onboarding options when you join a server — no manual setup needed
